widgets_values:

https://whop.com/icekiub/

ICY WAN ANIMATE 2.2 (Full Body replacement)

→ Discord:
🔗https://discord.gg/J4zvKsgd6M

→ Check out our YT channel: 
🔗https://www.youtube.com/@icekiubai/videos


The higher the resolution, the higher the processing time
You will need to do some basic math to determine how many frames you do per sampler, this amount you can do per sampler will depend on your available amount of VRAM. The more you have the more frames you can do at once.

For example, using a RTX PRO 6000 you can do as many frames as you want at once.

I recommend starting with 81 frames chunks (5seconds) per sampler and go up or down from there depending on your hardware and chosen resolution.


How to use;

Select your resolution (Will resize your video to match those numbers on the longest side)

1: for 320 for testing, 

2: for 640 (LOW RES)

3: for 832 (MED RES)

4: for 960 (HIGH RES)

5: for 1280 (MAX RES)

- Drop in your reference Image in the first frame Klein match, if you dont want to use frame match, connect a load image to the referenceimage Set Node, to the right of the video upload.

- Drop in your reference Video

Frame load cap is the maximum number of frames you want to process**

Select every nth; Choose every N number of frames. Setting this to 2 will use every second frame of your video and thus reduce the processing time by half, we can interpolate at the end to get the full amount of frames back**

- Queue the workflow to get the number of clips your video will need and the number of frames in your last clip and cancel this run of the workflow

- Activate the required number of clip groups and change the length frame in your last clip group

--------------------------------------------------

Prerequisites for this workflow:

1️⃣ Update ComfyUI

Ensure ComfyUI is updated to the latest version.

Install Missing nodes with ComfyUI Manager

2️⃣ Download and Place Model Files

Klein

Diffusion_models: https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9b-fp8/blob/main/flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors

text_encoders: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors

vae: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors


Location: ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/

Wan2_2-Animate-14B_fp8_scaled_e4m3fn_KJ_v2.safetensors	

https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy_fp8_scaled/resolve/main/Wan22Animate/Wan2_2-Animate-14B_fp8_scaled_e4m3fn_KJ_v2.safetensors

🔧 Required Dependencies

VAE Models

Location: ComfyUI/models/vae/

wan_2.1_vae.safetensors	

https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/vae/wan_2.1_vae.safetensors

Text Encoders

Location: ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/

https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors

CLIP Vision Models

🎨 ANIMATE-Specific LoRAs
